sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29469" key="dusprospo/ristos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσπροσ-πόριστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29469.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bad for foraging in</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χώρα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
